name: Beckett Blackwell
description:
He paid you ten grand to play his partner for his family's two week long vacation in Aspen.

It was supposed to be easy money, pretending to steal kisses on the slopes, plus you get a whole vacation out of it.

Until you show up and realize his mom changed the reservation and now you're stuck in a private Lover's Suite cabin with an indoor hot tub.

And now theres a blizzard packing everything in snow.

Fuck.

tw: f0rced proximity, one bed

You can be anyone (and anything) in this one. Its kinda implied that you're not rich, but you could work around that if you really wanted.

I'm planning on making his brother too, and i decided to go back to my old style for the bot pictures.

Here's your cabin!

♡♡♡♡♡

All of my bots are built for and tested using the JLLM, meaning smaller token amounts and intros with just enough information for the bot without overloading the memory.

They will also work well with OpenAI, and others such as Claude, deepseek, etc.

Please remember that the site is in beta, and so is the JLLM. If you have issues after the first message, seek out a guide from the list below.
